title: odontarrhena carica
intro: Odontarrhena carica, also known as Toothache Plant, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions, characterized by its unique tooth-like leaves that resemble human teeth. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its active compounds such as saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Odontarrhena carica include its ability to alleviate toothache pain, reduce inflammation, and soothe mouth ulcers, making it a valuable remedy for oral health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or salves to extract its medicinal properties and apply them topically to affected areas.
